subcodes.first_line: O illustrious Ismael! All the friends of God should be as a sacrifice unto the One true God. This means that they should sacrifice and immolate
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسمعیل جلیل جمیع یاران الهی باید ذبیح الهی باشند یعنی جمیع شئون خویش را
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God
